title: pyrus costata
intro: Pyrus costata, also known as the Chinese wild pear or wild pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pyrus costata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Pyrus costata can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
